lex.bot.s3bucketlogdestination.CfnAbout: Specifies an Amazon S3 bucket for logging audio conversations.

lex.bot.s3bucketlogdestination.KmsKeyArn.Description: Specifies the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Key Management Service key for encrypting audio log files stored in an Amazon S3 bucket.

lex.bot.s3bucketlogdestination.LogPrefix.Description: Specifies the Amazon S3 prefix to assign to audio log files.

lex.bot.s3bucketlogdestination.S3BucketA.Description: Specifies the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon S3 bucket where audio files are stored.
